raw_block:
–(Daughter of Laban and the favorite wife of Jacob)
–Meets Jacob 
at a wellGe 29:9-12
–Jacob serves Laban for an additional seven years to obtain her 
as his wifeGe 29:15-30
–Sterility ofGe 29:31
–Her grief in consequence of her sterility; gives her maid, to 
Jacob in order to obtain children in her own nameGe 30:1-8,15,22-34
–Later productiveness of; becomes the mother of
  .JosephGe 30:22-25
  .BenjaminGe 35:16-18,24
–Steals the household images (teraphim, legal deed) of her fatherGe 31:4,14-19,33-35
–Her death and burialGe 35:18-20;48:7;1Sa 10:2
